summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Post-Absorption VWAP Reversal Engine. Verified data loading (122295 bars, 2020-01-02 to 2026-03-06), validation/backtest reports (558 trades, 76.34% hit rate, -0.32 expectancy, 0.99 PF, NOT_VALIDATED status), plateau search (1621 stable configs, STABLE_PLATEAU_FOUND), pytest suite (11/11 passed), and confirmed no live execution code. Engine correctly reports NOT_VALIDATED due to negative after-cost expectancy and PF < 1.15, despite finding stable parameter regions.
passed_tests: MNQ data loading: 122295 bars from 2020-01-02 09:30 ET to 2026-03-06 15:55 ET
Validate report: NOT_VALIDATED status, 825 absorption events, 558 trades
Pytest suite: 11 tests passed, 1 warning (expected zero-volume warning)
Backend test suite: 8/8 tests passed (structure, CLI, reports, no lookahead, Pine script)
No live execution code: verified no webhook/broker/live trading code in Python or Pine
Honest failure reporting: correctly shows NOT_VALIDATED due to negative expectancy and PF < 1.15
